name: Cults and Lilacs
author: South
bootlegger: One player must die each day or the Evil team wins

When a Demon is picked by the Snake Charmer, they are turned into the lunatic instead of a poisoned Snake Charmer. On the first night after there are only 5 or less players left alive (Excluding Travellers), a Lunatic that was made in this way is told they are the Lunatic or the Snake Charmer is poisoned.
If the Klutz picks a Legion, instead of the game ending the Story Teller has to pick a Good player to die in the next night.
A Lunatic might Believe they are a minion, If so one of the real Minions is told there is a Lunatic in play and told the choices they make at night instead of the Demon.
